Name: CYLINDER_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines parameters related to joint capsules.

Fields.Name: Control Bone Name
Fields.Description: Bone name to apply (valid only when the setting method is skeleton)

Fields.Name: Target Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: Dummy poly ID to apply (valid only when the setting method is Dummy Polygon)

Fields.Name: Inverse Kinematics: Target (Z-Axis)
Fields.Description: Axis pointing towards the target (so that it does not overlap with other axes)

Fields.Name: Inverse Kinematics: Target (Y-Axis)
Fields.Description: Axis treated as left/right rotation (so that it does not overlap with other axes)
